label: AC-20(4)
title: Network Accessible Storage Devices — Prohibited Use

prose.en: Prohibit the use of {param:ac-20.04_odp} in external systems.

guidance.en: Network-accessible storage devices in external systems include online storage devices in public, hybrid, or community cloud-based systems.

prose.en: the use of {param:ac-20.04_odp} is prohibited in external systems.

objects.en: procedures addressing use of network-accessible storage devices in external systems
system configuration settings and associated documentation
list of network-accessible storage devices prohibited from use in external systems
Organizational personnel with responsibilities for prohibiting the use of network-accessible storage devices in external systems
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms prohibiting the use of network-accessible storage devices in external systems

guidelines.en: network-accessible storage devices prohibited from use in external systems are defined;
